ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* Code of the region (e.g., 0500000US01001) */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* Code of the state where the region is located */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state where the region is located */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Code of the country where the region is located */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country where the region is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the region */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator */,
  "indicator_code" TEXT /* Code of the economic indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the economic indicator */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the economic indicator */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the economic indicator */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the economic indicator (e.g., annual, quarterly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_points" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the data point belongs to */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the economic indicator the data point represents */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data point */,
  "quarter" INTEGER /* Quarter of the data point */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the data point */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the economic indicator for the given year */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval for the data point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES economic_indicators ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the data file belongs to */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the economic indicator the data file represents */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file (e.g., CSV, Excel) */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the data file (e.g., raw, processed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES economic_indicators ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the readme file belongs to */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the economic indicator the readme file represents */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "readme_type" TEXT /* Type of the readme file (e.g., data description, methodology) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES economic_indicators ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data point */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data point was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location of access (e.g., country, region) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES data_points ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the metadata entry belongs to */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the economic indicator the metadata entry represents */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the metadata entry */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the data */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "data_limitations" TEXT /* Limitations of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES economic_indicators ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point being versioned */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the data point */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES data_points ("data_id")
)
